title: 🧩subworkflow - aws ec2 terminate instance and verify terminated
description:
Subworkflow to terminate an EC2 instance and verify it reaches the 'terminated' state. Used for zombie instance cleanup and auto-healing.

Parameters:

instanceId: (Required) EC2 instance ID to terminate
awsRegion: (Required) AWS region
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection name
guide:
## ❌ Subworkflow — Terminate EC2 Instance and Verify

Terminates the specified EC2 instance and waits until it reaches the 'terminated' state. Used for zombie instance cleanup, auto-healing, and cost reduction.

⚠️ This is irreversible. Use with caution and always ensure the correct instance ID is passed.

### ⚙️ Parameters
- **instanceId** (Required): EC2 instance ID to terminate
- **awsRegion** (Required): AWS region
- **dynatraceawsconnection** (Required): Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection name

ec2_wait_terminated.name: ec2_wait_terminated
ec2_wait_terminated.description: Wait until the EC2 instance is fully terminated.
